headline: Is Nasdaq (NDAQ) Pricing Look Rich After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Nasdaq's share price still offers fair value or is starting to look stretched, this article will walk through what the current valuation signals are really saying. Nasdaq closed at US$88.27, with returns of 0.6% over the last 30 days and 17.3% over the past year. Year to date, the stock shows an 8.7% decline, and longer-term 3 and 5 year returns of 69.6% and 96.0% respectively. Recent coverage of Nasdaq has focused on its role as a major market operator and...
